reviews.comment:
Un desastre. Cuando reservamos no nos dijeron que el restaurante estaba cerrado. Y a la mañana del otro día no nos dieron el desayuno.  Eran las 8.30 y seguía cerrado. Un desastre el concesionario!

(Translated by Google)
A disaster. When we booked, they didn't tell us the restaurant was closed. And the next morning, they didn't serve us breakfast. It was 8:30 and it was still closed. The car dealership was a disaster!

reviews.comment:
Completo lugar
Wifi. Cosa importante porque en la zona no hay claro.
Café con leche, combustible y a seguir la ruta.
Buena parada.

(Translated by Google)
Great place. Wi-Fi. Important because there's no clear Wi-Fi in the area. Coffee with milk, fuel, and back on the road. Good stop.

reviews.comment:
Muy limpio todo muy buena atencion ..y los sawchy riquisimos..lo que me gustaria que pudieran hacer desde ahi cualquier urgencia.pero yo como socia del ACA.estoy mas que agradecida con todos los servicios

(Translated by Google)
Everything is very clean, very good service... and the sawchy is delicious... I wish they could take care of any emergency from there. But as an ACA member, I am more than grateful for all the services.
